entries.original_str: A suggested fee is automatically added to this field. You may override it. The suggested fee increases with the size of the transaction.
entries.translation: A suggested fee is automatically added to this field. You may override it. The suggested fee increases with the size of the transaction.

entries.original_str: Number of zeros displayed after the decimal point. For example, if this is set to 2, \"1.\" will be displayed as \"1.00\"
entries.translation: Number of zeros displayed after the decimal point. For example, if this is set to 2, \"1.\" will be displayed as \"1.00\"

entries.original_str: Select file to export your private keys to
entries.translation: Select file to export your private keys to

entries.original_str: Select which language is used in the GUI (after restart).
entries.translation: Select which language is used in the GUI (after restart).

entries.original_str: The amount of fee can be decided freely by the sender. However, transactions with low fees take more time to be processed.
entries.translation: The amount of fee can be decided freely by the sender. However, transactions with low fees take more time to be processed.

entries.original_str: The description is not sent to the recipient of the funds. It is stored in your wallet file, and displayed in the 'History' tab.
entries.translation: The description is not sent to the recipient of the funds. It is stored in your wallet file, and displayed in the 'History' tab.

entries.original_str: The following inputs could not be imported
entries.translation: The following inputs could not be imported

entries.original_str: This seed will allow you to recover your wallet in case of computer failure.
entries.translation: This seed will allow you to recover your wallet in case of computer failure.

entries.original_str: To make sure that you have properly saved your seed, please retype it here.
entries.translation: To make sure that you have properly saved your seed, please retype it here.

entries.original_str:
Warning: The next address will not be recovered automatically if you restore your wallet from seed; you may need to add it manually.

This occurs because you have too many unused addresses in your wallet. To avoid this situation, use the existing addresses first.

Create anyway?
entries.translation:
Warning: The next address will not be recovered automatically if you restore your wallet from seed; you may need to add it manually.

This occurs because you have too many unused addresses in your wallet. To avoid this situation, use the existing addresses first.

Create anyway?

entries.original_str: Your wallet history has been successfully exported.
entries.translation: Your wallet history has been successfully exported.

entries.original_str: To make sure that you have properly saved your seed, please retype it here.
entries.translation: To make sure that you have properly saved your seed, please retype it here.

entries.original_str: This seed will allow you to recover your wallet in case of computer failure.
entries.translation: This seed will allow you to recover your wallet in case of computer failure.
